parameters.query:
UPDATE autoflow_events SET status = 'alerted', updated_at = NOW() WHERE event_id = '{{ $('Alert — Receive Decision').first().json.event_id }}';
UPDATE autoflow_decisions SET status = 'alerted', updated_at = NOW() WHERE decision_id = '{{ $('Alert — Receive Decision').first().json.decision_id }}';

INSERT INTO autoflow_actions (action_id, decision_id, event_id, service_name, namespace, action_type, action_status, executed_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.action_id }}', '{{ $json.decision_id }}', '{{ $json.event_id }}', '{{ $json.service_name }}', '{{ $json.namespace }}', '{{ $json.action_taken }}', 'executing', '{{ $json.action_executed_at }}') RETURNING id;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'remediation_complete', action_taken: $('Merge Action Paths').first().json.action_taken, action_id: $('Merge Action Paths').first().json.action_id, simulated: true }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE autoflow_actions SET action_status = 'success', outcome = 'recovered', recovery_metric_value = {{ $json.recovery_metric_value }}, mttr_seconds = {{ $json.mttr_seconds }}, resolved_at = NOW() WHERE action_id = '{{ $json.action_id }}';
UPDATE autoflow_events SET status = 'resolved', updated_at = NOW() WHERE event_id = '{{ $json.event_id }}';

UPDATE autoflow_actions SET action_status = 'failed', outcome = 'not_recovered', recovery_metric_value = {{ $json.recovery_metric_value }}, resolved_at = NOW() WHERE action_id = '{{ $json.action_id }}';
UPDATE autoflow_events SET status = 'escalated', updated_at = NOW() WHERE event_id = '{{ $json.event_id }}';

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const body = [
  `🚨 AutoFlow ESCALATION — Auto-remediation FAILED`,
  ``,
  `Service: ${d.service_name} in ${d.namespace}`,
  `Action Attempted: ${d.action_taken}`,
  `Current Metric Value after action: ${d.recovery_metric_value}`,
  `Recovery Threshold Was: ${d.recovery_threshold}`,
  ``,
  `Service did NOT recover after automated fix. Manual intervention required.`,
  ``,
  `Decision ID: ${d.decision_id}`,
  `Action ID: ${d.action_id}`,
  `Time: ${new Date().toISOString()}`
].join('\n');
return { json: { ...d, escalation_email_body: body } };

parameters.subject: =🚨 AutoFlow ESCALATION — {{ $json.service_name }} did NOT recover | Manual action needed

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ trigger: 'learning', recovered: true, event_id: $json.event_id, decision_id: $json.decision_id, action_id: $json.action_id, agents: $json.agents }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ trigger: 'learning', recovered: false, event_id: $json.event_id, decision_id: $json.decision_id, action_id: $json.action_id, agents: $json.agents }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT agent_name, current_weight, initial_weight, total_predictions, correct_predictions FROM autoflow_agent_weights WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY agent_name;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'learning_complete', outcome: $('Learning — Receive Outcome').first().json.outcome, weights_updated: true, new_weights: $json.updated_weights }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ action_id: $('Merge Action Paths').first().json.action_id, decision_id: $('Merge Action Paths').first().json.decision_id, action_type: $('Merge Action Paths').first().json.action_taken, action_status: 'executing' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ action_id: $json.action_id, decision_id: $json.decision_id, action_type: $json.action_taken, action_status: 'success', outcome: 'recovered', recovery_metric_value: $json.recovery_metric_value, mttr_seconds: $json.mttr_seconds }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ action_id: $json.action_id, decision_id: $json.decision_id, action_type: $json.action_taken, action_status: 'failed', outcome: 'not_recovered', recovery_metric_value: $json.recovery_metric_value }) }}
